title: Need support access for 3rd party app developers
excerpt: We have apps on Monday marketplace and time to time our clients face issues. And in order to help them we need to access their boards. Yet we loose some time as clients make mistakes or smth doesn’t work. Having an optio…

posts.author: k.moskalenko (Kseniia Moskalenko)
posts.cookedHtml: We have apps on Monday marketplace and time to time our clients face issues. And in order to help them we need to access their boards. Yet we loose some time as clients make mistakes or smth doesn’t work. Having an option on support access (same as Monday developers have) would really increase resolution time and smooth cooperation.
